message:
beads: sync tracker with seven newly-filed issues

Adds seven issue records that were created locally but not yet pushed to
the tracker JSONL. These correspond to bugs/gaps discovered while
landing the recent connector hardening work:

  - cmkuk  fcp-discord: invalid embeds input silently discarded in
                         send/edit paths
  - g37n0  fcp-slack: ok=true responses can panic on missing payload
                       data (now addressed in 2dd92d08)
  - q0y8h  fcp-kubernetes: const fn str matches break fcp-e2e package
                            test builds (now addressed in f8712801)
  - r16hf  qdrant: add real-Qdrant testcontainer lifecycle coverage
                    (addressed in the next commit)
  - uyitl  fcp-e2e: single-harness runs compile unrelated broken
                     connector dev-deps (in_progress)
  - x6qrn  postgresql: add real Postgres/PostgREST testcontainer
                        transaction coverage (now addressed in f9231371)
  - zz33u  google-drive: lacks FCP2 manifest + shared compliance
                          harness (now addressed in 6653c5d0)

No code changes; only the tracker JSONL is updated so that the bead IDs
referenced in recent commit trailers resolve in the tracker after push.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
